data.title: Trump pardoned Changpeng Zhao and Ross Ulbricht but not Sam Bankman-Fried who is serving 25 years for fraud. SBF's parents lobbied for pardon unsuccessfully. Trump swayed by Bankman-Fried's $5.2M Biden donation and won't pardon him.
data.description: President Donald Trump stated to The New York Times that he will not be granting a pardon to former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried. Bankman-Fried is currently serving a 25-year sentence for fraud and conspiracy. This decision comes despite Trump's recent grants of clemency to other prominent figures in the cryptocurrency world, such as Binance founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao and Ross Ulbricht. Bankman-Fried's parents, Barbara Fried and Joseph Bankman, who are former Stanford Law School professors, attempted to secure a pardon for their son by lobbying within Trump's circle. Despite their efforts, Trump remained unmoved. Bankman-Fried, known for his involvement in Bitcoin, pursued a media campaign to improve his image among Republicans, even commending Trump's pardon of former Honduran president Juan Orlando Hernández for drug offenses. Despite this strategy, Trump's decision remained unchanged. In contrast, Bankman-Fried made a significant donation of $5.2 million to the Biden campaign in 2020, potentially influencing the political... (Character count: 958)

data.title: Novartis investing $23 billion in US, building fourth RLT facility in Florida to enhance cancer treatment accessibility.
data.description: Novartis, a leading medicines company, announced plans for its fourth US radioligand therapy (RLT) facility in Winter Park, Florida, as part of a $23 billion investment to meet increasing demand for cancer treatments. The 35,000-square-foot facility will be operational by 2029, helping to deliver RLT medicines to patients in the southeast US. Novartis aims to maintain its high dosage administration rate of over 99%. Florida's investment in life sciences and technology makes it an attractive location for the facility. Novartis, a pioneer in RLT, has global expertise in this treatment, with ongoing research in various cancer types. The company plans to solidify its US RLT manufacturing network over the next five years, with the new Florida facility being one of five sites. Novartis is focused on reimagining cancer care through RLT for advanced cancers, with trials ongoing in multiple cancer types. The company emphasizes the importance of specialized talent and manufacturing techniques in ensuring timely delivery of RLT to patients.

data.title: Guide Sensmart presents ApexVision technology at CES 2026 in Las Vegas, highlighting next-gen thermal imaging. Booth #21740.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, Guide Sensmart Booth (#21740) is generating buzz at CES 2026 for its cutting-edge thermal imaging advancements. They are presenting ApexVision, a state-of-the-art thermal imaging technology aimed at enhancing visual capabilities.

data.title: Nuclear industry surges as Meta signs agreements for 6 gigawatts of nuclear energy, driving sector's growth.
data.description: On Friday, Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) made a significant move into the nuclear energy sector, causing a surge in the OKLO stock price. The company's entrance into this field was marked by the announcement of agreements totaling over 6 gigawatts of capacity. This development highlights the increasing demand for carbon-free power from Big Tech companies, driving the growth of the nuclear industry. The momentum began with a notable 20-year deal between Meta and Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST), where Meta will acquire 2.6 gigawatts of energy from Vistra's nuclear assets in Ohio and Pennsylvania. The partnership with Meta signifies a potentially impactful shift in the renewable energy landscape, as detailed in a broader report on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones up by 0.2%, gained to 49,342.43; U.S. economy added 50,000 jobs in Dec, easing concerns about job losses.
data.description: U.S. stocks saw gains in early trading, with the Dow Jones up 0.2%, sitting at 49,342.43 and the NASDAQ and S&P 500 both rising by 0.29% to 23,547.90 and 6,941.76, respectively on Friday. Utilities sector gained 2%, while consumer discretionary stocks dipped by 0.6%. The U.S. economy closed 2025 with a steadier labor market, added 50,000 nonfarm payrolls in December. Rich Sparkle Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: ANPA) shares surged by 112% to $51.41. Check out Benzinga for more.

data.title: Wearable AI gadgets at CES 2026 capture activities and conversations, emerging as the next big trend.
data.description: At the CES 2026 event, a novel type of wearable AI gadgets was introduced, enabling users to capture their activities and conversations. These devices have sparked interest as they hold the potential to become the next major trend in technology. They offer users the capability to document their daily experiences and interactions.

data.title: Southwest stock receives double upgrade; attractive ahead of earnings. Delta set to report.
data.description: Southwest Airlines saw its stock receive a double upgrade based on its promising outlook potential, with the airline's setup deemed attractive as earnings season approaches. Additionally, Delta Airlines is set to report its earnings soon. This news was highlighted in a recent article titled "Airline Scores Breakout, Receives Double Upgrade," emphasizing the positive developments within the airline industry.

data.title: Jobs report impacts Fed rate-cut odds; no tariff ruling yet. News coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: There is potential for a Trump tariff decision to impact market trends significantly. The recent jobs report has led to reduced likelihood of a Fed rate cut, while no ruling on tariffs has been made. This update was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.
